mdx.excerpt:
Fibozzle, in Rust Back in 2018 I wrote  Fibbozle , a console game in C that
plays like 2048 except tiles merge along the Fibonacci series…

frontmatter.title: Fibozzle, in Rust
frontmatter.description: A Rust remake of Fibbozle, my old C console game — 2048 where tiles merge along the Fibonacci series — rebuilt as a full Ratatui TUI with saves, undo, and a leaderboard, and shipped on Homebrew.
frontmatter.bannercaption: The old C game, reborn as a proper Rust TUI
